WhatsApp Backup Inventory
Backups only load into the same linked WhatsApp account
Safety rule: a backup is restored only when its account number exactly matches the currently connected WhatsApp number.
Import WhatsApp Chat
From exported .txt file (Android / iPhone)
How to export: WhatsApp → Open chat → ⋮ menu → More → Export Chat → Without media → save .txt file to your PC.
Messages will be safely merged into the selected chat. No duplicate chats will be created. Duplicates of already imported messages will be ignored.

Notes
Saving...
Insert Media / Document
File upload — embeds image inline (keep under 2 MB).
Image URL — paste a public image link; Outlook renders it inline. ✅
Click URL — optional; wraps the image in a link (opens in browser when recipient clicks). ✅
or
File upload — added as attachment (Outlook can't play embedded video). 📎
YouTube / Vimeo URL — inserts a clickable thumbnail into the email body. ✅
Direct .mp4 URL — inserts a <video> tag (plays in Gmail, Apple Mail).
or
File upload — added as attachment (Outlook can't play embedded audio). 📎
Direct URL — inserts an <audio> player (plays in Gmail, Apple Mail).
or
Upload any document (PDF, Word, Excel, PPT, ZIP, etc.). It will be added as a file attachment — visible as a paperclip chip below the editor, just like Outlook.
Total Attachment Size 0.0 MB / 25 MB

Paste your HTML snippet below. It will be rendered in the editor at the cursor position.
